The mean rental price for single-family homes in Miami is $3,200, with a median of $2,800 and a standard deviation of $450. Outliers are identified using the 1.5 IQR rule, with 10% of homes priced above $4,000.  
The mean rental price for condos is $3,500, slightly higher than single-family homes, with a median of $3,200 and a standard deviation of $500. Outliers are detected similarly, with 10% of condos priced above $4,200.
